name: DCB Holdings Limited
summary: DCB Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides fitting-out and renovation services in Hong Kong. It operates through Fitting-Out Work and Renovation Work segments. The company offers interior fitting-out services for new buildings; and renovation services, such as upgrade, makeover, and demolition of premises in the private sector, including residential apartments and residential dwellings, show flats, clubhouses, sale offices, public areas in residential and commercial buildings, offices, shopping malls, and shops. It serves property developers, main contractors or direct contractors, and owners or tenants of properties. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong. DCB Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Advance Goal Group Limited.
